name: telecommunications_communications_stonehaven_tru_loy
premise: A 911-over-IP failover test succeeded but exposed call metadata to a third-party analytics vendor not in the BAAs. In Telecommunications, the situation tagged internally around telecommunications communications stonehaven tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A vendor bridge ends at forty-five minutes; after that, configuration changes require a full change-advisory board. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Ravi Sato
agents.identity: I am Ravi Sato, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Telecommunications. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Marco Reed
agents.identity: I am Marco Reed, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Telecommunications. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if truth advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for loyalty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Ravi Sato must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Ravi Sato do?
